channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Nintendo Shares Slide After 2026 Game Showcase Disappoints
item.description: Nintendo's stock dropped significantly after a lackluster game showcase failed to deliver new titles from major franchises. Investors expressed disappointment over the presentation.

item.title: Toby Fox Shares New Development Update On Deltarune Chapter 6
item.description: Toby Fox announced progress on Deltarune Chapter 6, with plans to start Chapter 7 development this year. Fans eagerly await further updates.

item.title: The 25 Most Exciting Games Of Summer Game Fest 2026
item.description: The Summer Game Fest showcased numerous trailers, highlighting the most anticipated games of the season. Here are the top 25 picks from the event.

item.title: The App Store is going to add subscription bundles soon
item.description: Apple's App Store will introduce subscription bundles for iPhone apps, enhancing user experience with grouped subscriptions. This change comes with iOS 27.

item.title: NBA The Run Review
item.description: NBA The Run offers a quick-match basketball experience reminiscent of NBA Street, but lacks depth. It's a fun yet shallow gameplay option for fans.

item.title: God of War Laufey Director Pushes Back on Cosmic Cube Criticism
item.description: The director of God of War Laufey defends the inclusion of Phranque, stating it was always planned and enhances gameplay mechanics. Fans remain divided.

item.title: Microsoft June 2026 Patch Tuesday fixes 3 zero-day, 200 flaws
item.description: Microsoft's June Patch Tuesday addresses 200 vulnerabilities, including three critical zero-day flaws. Users are urged to update their systems immediately.

item.title: Pokemon Pokopia Getting Free Underwater Expansion And Paid DLC
item.description: Pokemon Pokopia will receive a free underwater expansion alongside paid DLC, creating some confusion among players. Clarifications are provided on the offerings.

item.title: 'DK Challenge' Will Put Your NSO & Bananza Skills To The Test
item.description: Nintendo announces the 'DK Challenge' event, testing players' skills in a Mario-themed Bananza. The event starts soon, promising fun competition.

item.title: macOS 27 Finally Brings Direct Touch Control to Sidecar
item.description: macOS 27 introduces direct touch control for Sidecar, allowing iPad users to interact with macOS elements directly. This feature enhances usability significantly.

item.title: Final Fantasy gets its first HD-2D game, and it was worth the wait
item.description: Final Fantasy Resonance debuts as the franchise's first HD-2D game, blending nostalgia with modern graphics. Fans are excited about this new direction.

item.title: New Joy-Con Colours And A Stand-Alone Direct Are Inbound For Splatoon Raiders
item.description: Nintendo announces new Joy-Con colors and a dedicated Direct for Splatoon Raiders, generating excitement among fans. More details are expected soon.

item.title: Fire Emblem: Fortune’s Weave boxart, screenshots
item.description: Fire Emblem: Fortune’s Weave reveals its official boxart and new screenshots following the Nintendo Direct. Fans are excited for this new entry.

item.title: Over A Year Before Release, Stellar Blade: Blood Rain’s New Hero Evie Draws Fire
item.description: Stellar Blade: Blood Rain introduces a new protagonist, Evie, stirring controversy ahead of its release next year. Fans are divided over the character's design.

item.title: Kingdom Hearts IV Gameplay Trailer Revealed, Will Launch Simultaneously On Consoles And PC
item.description: Kingdom Hearts IV gameplay trailer unveiled, confirming simultaneous launch on consoles and PC. Fans are eager for more details on this highly anticipated sequel.
